protein_name: The production of the second messenger molecules diacylglycerol (DAG) and inositol 1,4,5-trisphosphate (IP3) is mediated by activated phosphatidylinositol-specific phospholipase C enzymes. 3 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Biological Process: cell chemotaxis; detection of chemical stimulus involved in sensory perception of bitter taste; G protein-coupled receptor signaling pathway; intracellular signal transduction; lipid catabolic process; lipid metabolic process; phosphatidylinositol metabolic process; phosphatidylinositol-mediated signaling; phospholipase C-activating G protein-coupled receptor signaling pathway; phospholipid metabolic process; release of sequestered calcium ion into cytosol; signal transduction
